meaning: v.波动,起伏,成波浪形adj.波浪形的,起伏的
examples: As we travel south, the countryside begins to undulate as the rolling hills sweep down to the riverbanks.
Their surfaces undulate to simulate Canada's terrain.
It also teaches and enables them to undulate their body more.
Afro-Cuban percussion, loungy jazz textures, and rock psychedelia undulate together in a hypnotically soulful way.
Hallways on either side undulate with a tunnel of pulsing blue, then purple, lights.
